description_for_human: Real-time official and parallel market exchange rates for the Algerian Dinar (DZD).
description_for_model: DinarExchange is a Progressive Web App that displays real-time exchange rates for the Algerian Dinar. It shows both the official banking rate sourced from the Frankfurter API (European Central Bank data) and the parallel/informal market rate from Square Port-Saïd d'Alger. Users can convert currencies, view historical charts, and save favorites. The app works fully offline as a PWA. Tracked currencies include USD, EUR, GBP, CHF, CAD, AED, SAR, CNY, TRY, TND, MAD, JPY.
